fun_fact: Climate change may seem like a problem for polar bears, small island nations or people exposed to forest fires - a problem for someone else, somewhere else and at some other time. But it's here, it's now and it's happening to all of us. It affects our food, our homes, and so much more. Torchlight is an attempt to surface some of these invisible impacts. Today we celebrate **Torchlight #100**. Thank you for playing along! Keep playing and share it with a friend who may like it!
